basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Temporary Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website of NIT Calicut. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Calicut Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant field, First class in UG and PG (60% or 6.5/10 CGPA), Ph.D. thesis submitted candidates eligible with proof
qualification.details: Centre for Innovation, Entrepreneurship and Incubation (CIEI): Ph.D. in Entrepreneurship/Management/Industrial Engineering/related areas with minimum 2 years of experience Humanities, Arts and Social Sciences (German): Undergraduate and Postgraduate degrees in German. Fluency (written and spoken skills) in German is mandatory. OR DALF/DSH-B2 with a Master's degree in any domain Humanities, Arts and Social Sciences (English): PhD English/PhD English Language Teaching with Masters in English/ English Language Education/ English Language and Literature/ English and Comparative Literature Humanities, Arts and Social Sciences (Economics): PhD in Economics with Masters in Economics/ Finance/ Commerce or Industry personnel with MBA in Finance from reputed institution Department of Management Studies: Ph.D. in Finance/ Operations/ Analytics/ Management / related areas or Industry personnel with MBA in Finance/ Analytics/Operations/ any domain of Management/ Masters in Finance /M Tech in Industrial Engineering from reputed institutions Mathematics: Ph.D. in Mathematics/ Statistics Chemical Engineering: Ph.D. in Electrical Sciences/ Electrical Energy Systems Centre for Indian Knowledge Systems (CIKS): Ph.D. in Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS)/ Sanskrit/ Indian Philosophy / Darshanas/ Indian History of Science, Mathematics, or Astronomy/ Traditional Indian Architecture / IKS-based Architecture/ Vedic Studies / Nyaya / Mimamsa / Vedanta/ Ayurveda / Yoga / Classical Indian Literature/ Humanities or Interdisciplinary Studies with a strong focus on Indian Knowledge Systems. Proficiency in Sanskrit (read, write, speak) is essential

selection_process: Interview Presentation on area of specialization
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Centre for Innovation, Entrepreneurship and Incubation (CIEI): Ph.D. in Entrepreneurship/Management/Industrial Engineering/related areas with minimum 2 years of experience Humanities, Arts and Social Sciences (German): Undergraduate and Postgraduate degrees in German. Fluency (written and spoken skills) in German is mandatory. OR DALF/DSH-B2 with a Master's degree in any domain Humanities, Arts and Social Sciences (English): PhD English/PhD English Language Teaching with Masters in English/ English Language Education/ English Language and Literature/ English and Comparative Literature Humanities, Arts and Social Sciences (Economics): PhD in Economics with Masters in Economics/ Finance/ Commerce or Industry personnel with MBA in Finance from reputed institution Department of Management Studies: Ph.D. in Finance/ Operations/ Analytics/ Management / related areas or Industry personnel with MBA in Finance/ Analytics/Operations/ any domain of Management/ Masters in Finance /M Tech in Industrial Engineering from reputed institutions Mathematics: Ph.D. in Mathematics/ Statistics Chemical Engineering: Ph.D. in Electrical Sciences/ Electrical Energy Systems Centre for Indian Knowledge Systems (CIKS): Ph.D. in Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS)/ Sanskrit/ Indian Philosophy / Darshanas/ Indian History of Science, Mathematics, or Astronomy/ Traditional Indian Architecture / IKS-based Architecture/ Vedic Studies / Nyaya / Mimamsa / Vedanta/ Ayurveda / Yoga / Classical Indian Literature/ Humanities or Interdisciplinary Studies with a strong focus on Indian Knowledge Systems. Proficiency in Sanskrit (read, write, speak) is essential

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview Presentation on area of specialization

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Temporary Faculty posts at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Temporary Faculty positions at NIT Calicut is 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Temporary Faculty at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies for Temporary Faculty positions released by NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Calicut Temporary Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official NIT Calicut website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Temporary Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is generally a Ph.D. in a relevant field, with first-class marks in UG and PG degrees. Candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are also eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Temporary Faculty positions ranges from Rs. 58,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month, depending on the qualification and post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for NIT Calicut Temporary Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1000/-, while SC/ST and Women candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an interview and a presentation on the candidate's area of specialization.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The walk-in date mentioned in the notification is 17-07-2026, which is likely the interview date.

faq.question: Q9. Which departments are recruiting for Temporary Faculty at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Departments include CIEI, Humanities (German, English, Economics), Management Studies, Mathematics, Chemical Engineering, and CIKS.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
